recipe.title: Saturday: Garlic Butter Shrimp Scampi over Linguine
ingredients: • 1.5 lb large shrimp, peeled and deveined
• 1/2 cup dry white wine (or chicken broth)
• 6 cups arugula, 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 small shallot, sliced
steps: Cook linguine. Reserve 1/2 cup pasta water before draining.|In large skillet, melt butter over medium. Add garlic, cook 1 min. Add wine, reduce 2 min. Add lemon zest + juice.|Add shrimp, cook 3–4 min per side until pink. Fold in parsley, season with red pepper flakes, salt/pepper.|Toss drained pasta with shrimp and sauce. Add pasta water as needed to loosen.|Make salad: toss arugula with olive oil, lemon juice, shallot, salt/pepper.|Serve scampi over pasta with arugula salad on the side.
